Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.SizeValidator

Packages that use SizeValidator
Package
Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
Interfaces that may be extended but not implemented (because the methods contain a generic return type).
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

    Method
    Description

    Returns a validator over Multimap.size().

    Method
    Description

    Validates nested requirements.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SizeValidator
    SizeValidator.isNegative()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always positive
    SizeValidator
    SizeValidator.isNotNegative()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always positive
    SizeValidator
    ArrayValidator.length()
    Returns a validator over the array's length.
    SizeValidator
    StringValidator.length()
    Returns a validator for the length of the actual value.
    SizeValidator
    MapValidator.size()
    Returns a validator for Map.size().
